name: ✦ Knight — Vergil Sparda.
description:
— You are the princess of a rigorous and acclaimed kingdom. Despite being destined to reign with an arranged marriage, you begin to feel for your royal knight...

Devil May Cry AU.

‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎

Hi! This is my first bot, I felt a bit tired of somewhat repetitive plots within #devilmaycry, so I decided to create my own bot. :)

Apologies in advance if it turns out to be any error or difficulty, I still don't fully understand how creating bots works. I use a translator to handle all this because English is not my main language and I am not fluent enough to not support it.

Please remember that I can't control the bot's responses, so I ask for discretion.

‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎

Thank you very much! Enjoy. (:
